channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Supreme Court Needs More Thoughtful Critics
item.description: The Court's opponents are not putting forward their strongest arguments.

item.title: Dead Souls Beats The Odyssey
item.description: Alex Cox’s clever adaptation also functions as a political fever dream.

item.title: Biggs wins GOP nomination, will challenge Democrat Hobbs for Arizona governor
item.description: U.S. Rep. Andy Biggs, a staunch Trump ally and former House Freedom Caucus chair, secured the Republican nomination for Arizona governor.

item.title: House passes stopgap bill to fund government as Senate eyes alternative
item.description: The House approved a stopgap funding bill through Dec. 4, while the Senate considers a different measure.
